title: Tunisian Tagine Chicken Stew
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew inspired by the cuisine of Tunisia, made with chicken, apples, and spices.

ingredients.name: xenial spice blend
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a combination of cinnamon, cumin, and coriander

ingredients.name: tunisian olive oil
ingredients.notes: or substitute with regular olive oil

ingredients.name: tagine spice blend
ingredients.notes: or substitute with a combination of ginger, cumin, and coriander

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the apple, xenial spice blend, tunisian spice blend, and chicken broth to the pot.
Return the chicken to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, until the chicken is cooked through and the apples are tender, about 20-25 minutes.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
